goals.title: Implement orchestrator mode stabilization for ATLAS. Stabilize orches...
goals.objective: Implement orchestrator mode stabilization for ATLAS. Stabilize orchestrator dispatch with strict evidence gates preserved: positive mock/real worker paths complete only with valid stage evidence; missing/invalid evidence becomes error or blocked and blocks downstream; pipeline state and UI preserve blocked vs failed; single-worker mode remains unaffected. Use the existing plan at .omo/plans/orchestrator-mode-stabilization.md as scope.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call + CLI transcript: run focused orchestrator positive path tests, then use a FastAPI TestClient HTTP scenario to POST /api/pipeline/dispatch with exec_mode=orchestrator against mock workers and capture /api/jobs JSON showing rtl/lint completed only after required evidence exists.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-positive-http.txt containing command output, HTTP request/response JSON, completed rtl/lint statuses, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-positive-http.txt | cleanup: TestClient tempdir removed after context; no live worker/server process spawned
successCriteria.notes: Focused positive orchestrator tests pass; TestClient HTTP dispatch shows rtl/lint completed only with rtl_compile/lint/stage-engine artifacts and DB passed rows.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call + CLI transcript: run negative orchestrator evidence tests and use TestClient HTTP scenario where worker reports completed without evidence; capture /api/jobs, /api/pipeline/state, and DB workflow_runs showing owner stage error/blocked and downstream blocked, not green.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-negative-http.txt containing command output, HTTP/state/DB JSON, error/blocked statuses, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-negative-http.txt | cleanup: TestClient tempdirs removed after contexts; no live worker/server process spawned
successCriteria.notes: Negative TestClient HTTP dispatch shows missing evidence becomes rtl error + lint blocked, while stage-engine blocked preserves rtl blocked + downstream blocked in jobs/state/DB.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser/API/CLI regression: verify frontend picker and UI status rendering tests, single-worker policy tests, and a browser or Playwright UI smoke selecting orchestrator and observing blocked/failed surface state without breaking single-worker mode.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-ui-single-worker.txt containing vitest/pytest output, browser or Playwright action log with picker state, UI blocked/failed assertion, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/orchestrator-ui-single-worker.txt | cleanup: Vite Playwright smoke killed server, closed browser context, screenshot persisted
successCriteria.notes: Backend policy tests, frontend vitest, and Playwright Vite component smoke verify exec picker single-worker→orchestrator and blocked/failed owner UI.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e8b3d-eb18-7c21-83d3-c959d41844ae/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e8b3d-eb18-7c21-83d3-c959d41844ae/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
